title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Expeditors India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Expeditors India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Expeditors India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Expeditors India:
Expeditors India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Expeditors India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
